SEARCH
Package org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar

Class ProxyRegistrarSettings

java.lang.Object
org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.Configuration
org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar.ProxyRegistrarSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProxyRegistrarSettingsDefault
public class ProxyRegistrarSettings extends Configuration implements Serializable
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected Boolean
    addToPath
    Specifies whether branches initiated in this proxy operation should include a Path header for the REGISTER request for this servlet container or not.
    protected List<String>
    defaultAllow
    If no 'Allow' header is defined in the REGISTER method, use this value for 'Allow' for the 200 OK.
    protected Flow
    flow
    Indicate that the specified flow be used while sending messages on this Proxy.
    protected Boolean
    noCancel
    Specifies whether the proxy should, or should not cancel outstanding branches upon receiving the first 2xx INVITE response as defined in RFC 3841.
    protected InetAddress
    outboundInterfaceAddress
    In multi-homed environment this method can be used to select the outbound interface to use when sending requests for proxy branches.
    protected InetSocketAddress
    outboundInterfaceSocketAddress
    In multi-homed environment this method can be used to select the outbound interface and port number to use for proxy branches.
    protected Boolean
    parallel
    Specifies whether to proxy in parallel or sequentially.
    protected Boolean
    proxyOnUnregistered
    Proxy the request to the 'To' header instead of issuing a 404 Not Found error.
    protected Integer
    proxyTimeout
    Sets the overall proxy timeout in seconds.
    protected Boolean
    recordRoute
    Specifies whether branches initiated in this proxy operation should include a Record-Route header for this servlet engine or not.
    protected Boolean
    recurse
    Specifies whether the servlet engine will automatically recurse or not.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
     
    protected Boolean
    supervised
    Specifies whether the controlling servlet is to be invoked for incoming responses relating to this proxying.

  • Field Details

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • defaultAllow

      protected List<String> defaultAllow
      If no 'Allow' header is defined in the REGISTER method, use this value for 'Allow' for the 200 OK. Otherwise, echo back the 'Allow' header values.

    • proxyOnUnregistered

      protected Boolean proxyOnUnregistered
      Proxy the request to the 'To' header instead of issuing a 404 Not Found error.

    • addToPath

      protected Boolean addToPath
      Specifies whether branches initiated in this proxy operation should include a Path header for the REGISTER request for this servlet container or not.

    • flow

      protected Flow flow
      Indicate that the specified flow be used while sending messages on this Proxy.

    • noCancel

      protected Boolean noCancel
      Specifies whether the proxy should, or should not cancel outstanding branches upon receiving the first 2xx INVITE response as defined in RFC 3841.

    • outboundInterfaceAddress

      protected InetAddress outboundInterfaceAddress
      In multi-homed environment this method can be used to select the outbound interface to use when sending requests for proxy branches.

    • outboundInterfaceSocketAddress

      protected InetSocketAddress outboundInterfaceSocketAddress
      In multi-homed environment this method can be used to select the outbound interface and port number to use for proxy branches.

    • parallel

      protected Boolean parallel
      Specifies whether to proxy in parallel or sequentially.

    • proxyTimeout

      protected Integer proxyTimeout
      Sets the overall proxy timeout in seconds.

    • recordRoute

      protected Boolean recordRoute
      Specifies whether branches initiated in this proxy operation should include a Record-Route header for this servlet engine or not. This shall affect all the branches created after its invocation. Record-routing is used to specify that this servlet engine must stay on the signaling path of subsequent requests.

    • recurse

      protected Boolean recurse
      Specifies whether the servlet engine will automatically recurse or not. If recursion is enabled the servlet engine will automatically attempt to proxy to contact addresses received in redirect (3xx) responses. If recursion is disabled and no better response is received, a redirect response will be passed to the application and will be passed upstream towards the client.

    • supervised

      protected Boolean supervised
      Specifies whether the controlling servlet is to be invoked for incoming responses relating to this proxying.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProxyRegistrarSettings

      public ProxyRegistrarSettings()

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public Proxy apply(Proxy proxy)
      Apply default configuration values to the 'proxy' object. Values include 'addToPath', 'flow', 'noCancel', 'outboundInterfaceAddress', outboundInterfaceSocketAddress', 'parallel', 'proxyTimeout', 'recordRoute', 'recurse' and 'supervised'.
      Parameters:
      proxy -
      Returns:
      the update proxy object
